symbols: the sunrise breaking through clouds at the horizon — the dawn of new creation, the light that pierces the darkness
the vast expanse of sea and sky — the primordial waters of Genesis over which the Spirit hovered
the thin line of shore — the boundary between land and sea established at creation
the dominant blue pervading the scene — the heavens declaring the glory of God in their serene immensity
the solitary point of warm light — hope, resurrection, the faithful promise of a new day
description: A contemporary landscape painting depicting a vast seascape at dawn or sunrise. The composition is dominated by expanses of soft blue — a pale turquoise sky above merging into a deeper blue-violet sea below. Near the center of the horizon, a band of warm pink and orange light breaks through low clouds, with a small point of golden-yellow brilliance at its core. At the lower right, a thin dark strip of shoreline or sandbar angles into the composition.
